3150260.name: Hope of Taru
3150260.description:
You wake up to find your world has changed. Can you remember what happened and find a cure to the curse upon the silent village of Taru?

Find the hints to your past and bring back life to your village in this small indie 2D platformer. Enjoy stunning artwork and an original soundtrack while unravelling the story of the petrified villagers of Taru in six increasingly challenging levels.

You’re not alone in this. Collect all stone fragments lost in the village and deliver them to priest Yuri high up in the temple to fix what is broken. Can you defeat all dangers and reach him in time for the final ritual?

==============================

This game was created as our second family summer holiday project (🏝️😎💻🏖️).
